_meta.instructions: Phase 1a: apply log rule. After Security Events confirm matches, swap action to skip with action_parameters below.

new_rule_log_phase.description: Allow MCP OAuth login and authorize paths (log phase)
new_rule_log_phase.expression: (http.host eq "inneranimalmedia.com" and (http.request.uri.path eq "/auth/login" or http.request.uri.path eq "/api/oauth/authorize" or http.request.uri.path eq "/auth/callback" or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/auth/callback/")) and (http.request.uri.query contains "response_type=code" or http.request.uri.query contains "client_id=" or http.request.uri.query contains "code_challenge=" or http.request.uri.query contains "flow=oauth" or http.request.uri.query contains "challenge=" or http.request.uri.query contains "redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fchatgpt.com" or http.request.uri.query contains "redirect_uri=https%253A%252F%252Fchatgpt.com"))

new_rule_skip_phase.description: Allow MCP OAuth login and authorize paths
new_rule_skip_phase.expression: (http.host eq "inneranimalmedia.com" and (http.request.uri.path eq "/auth/login" or http.request.uri.path eq "/api/oauth/authorize" or http.request.uri.path eq "/auth/callback" or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/auth/callback/")) and (http.request.uri.query contains "response_type=code" or http.request.uri.query contains "client_id=" or http.request.uri.query contains "code_challenge=" or http.request.uri.query contains "flow=oauth" or http.request.uri.query contains "challenge=" or http.request.uri.query contains "redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fchatgpt.com" or http.request.uri.query contains "redirect_uri=https%253A%252F%252Fchatgpt.com"))
